name: corvi
description: Read, dispatch, and verify Corvi's code-grounded implementation plans from your agent.

corvi_binary.title: Corvi binary path
corvi_binary.description: Path to the corvi CLI bundled inside Corvi.app. Change this if Corvi.app is not in /Applications.

allow_create_plan.title: Allow agent-generated plans (paid)
allow_create_plan.description: Whether the create_plan tool is exposed, letting the agent generate a Quick Plan on demand (a paid LLM call, ~$0.01–0.05 each; your agent still prompts before running it). On by default; set to "0" to make the plugin read-only.
